name: qanvas
description: Creative coding for q, compatible with kdb+. Runs client-side (jqport), against your local q license, or against a cloud q. kdb+ is a trademark of KX Systems; this project is not affiliated with or endorsed by KX.

scripts.dev:local-q: concurrently -n app,q-bridge -c cyan,yellow "npm run dev --workspace app" "node server/q-bridge.js"
